title: What Is Your Job Now, Farhan Thawar | Compile 26
summary: Farhan Thawar, head of engineering at Shopify, discusses how an engineer's job transforms when AI writes most code. Topics include shifts in the software development lifecycle, learning as collateral damage, moving bottlenecks, and the boundary between prototyping and production systems.
writeup: Farhan Thawar, head of engineering at Shopify, examines how an engineer's role changes once AI generates most code. The talk covers shifts across the software development lifecycle, the risk of learning becoming collateral damage, and how bottlenecks move rather than disappear. It also addresses the boundary between prototyping and production systems, a distinction that determines where AI-generated code is trusted.
